# Den

> Den is an ODM (Object-Document Mapper) for Go with two storage backends — SQLite and PostgreSQL. Same API, your choice of engine. Part of the Burrow ecosystem.

- Module: `github.com/oliverandrich/den`
- Go version: 1.25+
- License: MIT

## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/getting-started/installation/): Install Den and import a backend (SQLite or PostgreSQL) via side-effect imports
- [Quick Start](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/getting-started/quickstart/): Complete working example — define a document, store it, query it back
- [Backends](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/getting-started/backends/): Backend comparison, DSN formats, and when to use SQLite vs PostgreSQL

## Guide — Core

- [Documents](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/guide/documents/): Base + composable SoftDelete and Tracked embeds, struct tags, collection naming, ULID IDs, DenSettings interface
- [CRUD Operations](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/guide/crud/): Insert, InsertMany (PreValidate, ContinueOnError), FindByID, FindByIDs, Update, bulk Update, FindOneAndUpdate, FindOneAndUpsert, Delete, DeleteMany, HardDelete, IncludeSoftDeleted, Refresh
- [Queries](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/guide/queries/): Chainable QuerySet with lazy evaluation, where conditions, sort/limit/skip, cursor-based pagination, projections, streaming with Iter()
- [Relations](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/guide/relations/): Generic Link[T] type for one-to-one and one-to-many, lazy/eager/on-demand fetch, cascade write/delete rules, BackLinks, nesting depth

## Guide — Features

- [Aggregations](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/guide/aggregations/): Scalar aggregations (Avg, Sum, Min, Max), GroupBy with typed result structs, projections for field subsetting
- [Full-Text Search](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/guide/full-text-search/): FTS via den:"fts" tag, unified Search() API, FTS5 on SQLite, tsvector on PostgreSQL
- [Attachments & Storage](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/guide/attachments/): document.Attachment embed, den.Storage interface, FilesystemStorage, hard-delete cascade
- [Transactions](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/guide/transactions/): RunInTransaction with Tx-prefixed CRUD variants, commit/rollback via return value, backend concurrency differences
- [Lifecycle Hooks](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/guide/hooks/): BeforeInsert, AfterUpdate, Validate, and more via interfaces; execution order; hooks within transactions

## Guide — Data Integrity

- [Soft Delete](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/guide/soft-delete/): Embed SoftDelete for non-destructive deletion, IncludeDeleted(), HardDelete for permanent removal
- [Change Tracking](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/guide/change-tracking/): Embed Tracked for IsChanged, GetChanges, Revert; byte-level snapshot comparison
- [Revision Control](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/guide/revision-control/): Optimistic concurrency via _rev field, ErrRevisionConflict, IgnoreRevision(), pessimistic locking pattern
- [Validation](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/guide/validation/): Validate() interface for custom logic, go-playground/validator struct tags, combined execution order

## Guide — Operations

- [Migrations](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/guide/migrations/): Registry-based migrations for field renames, type changes, data transformations; atomic execution; Up/Down/UpOne/DownOne
- [Testing](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/guide/testing/): dentest.MustOpen for SQLite, dentest.MustOpenPostgres for PostgreSQL; auto-registration and cleanup

## Reference

- [API Reference](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/reference/api/): Complete reference of all public functions organized by category
- [Where Operators](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/reference/operators/): All query operators — comparison, null, set, array, map, string, regex, logical combinators
- [Error Types](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/reference/errors/): Sentinel errors (ErrNotFound, ErrDuplicate, ErrRevisionConflict, etc.) with errors.Is/As support
- [Struct Tags](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/reference/struct-tags/): json, den, and validate tag syntax and options; aggregation and projection tags
- [Configuration](https://den-odm.readthedocs.io/reference/configuration/): OpenURL, DSN formats, DenSettings interface, index definitions
